title: Stranded
description: A semi-hardcore modpack that strands you on a survival island. Hope you have your floaties!
body:
### 📖Description

This modpack will leave you stranded on a deserted island with no escape except the endless ocean beyond. And believe me, you won't want to venture into the water with the dangerous sea creatures lurking in the shadows...

### ⭐Features
#### 🩸Survival Mechanics
This modpack adds multiple survival mechanics to make your island survival experience harder, such as a thirst and temperature system and removing the ability to punch trees.
#### 🐟Mobs
This modpack includes multiple mods that improve the Minecraft ecosystem such as Alex's Mobs and Upgrade Aquatic.
#### 🏝️World Gen
This modpack includes all of Yung's Structure Mods, Dynamic Trees, and of course, the Survival Island mod.

### 🖊️Credits

🎣Aquaculture 2 by GFGrafanaStats
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture

🌊Upgrade Aquatic by TeamAbnormals
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/upgrade-aquatic

🌳Dynamic Trees by MaxHyper
https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees

🌎Biomes O' Plenty by GlitchfiendMods
https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty

### 📜Details

I give permission for you to modify this modpack and use this modpack in videos, as long as you give credit.
